notes: Direct CDP probe against a fresh automation page returned HTTP 400 with empty DOM.
A local browser-rendered probe succeeded after the site first returned HTTP 412 and then reloaded the page through challenge JavaScript.
Selectors and API findings below come from rendered DOM plus browser-observed network traffic.

spider_strategy.pagination: Use the browser-observed /common/search/ endpoint with page= and _pageSize=20 when full pagination is needed; otherwise first-page DOM parsing is stable.
notes: Fresh automation requests hit anti-bot logic first, so prefer a stealth session rather than a plain dynamic session.
Do not hardcode the dynamic UAta9QfS token; capture /common/search/ XHR from the browser session instead.
The list page already contains first-page items in rendered DOM, so DOM parsing is a valid fallback if XHR capture is unavailable.
Detail pages duplicate title/meta/content blocks for desktop and mobile layouts; normalize by selecting the first matching title and content container.
Detail pages are video pages: extract mp4 from the inline video element under #content.
